message:
Command `# Get unique pin names from DEF template
grep "^   - " /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u > /tmp/def_pins.txt
wc -l /tmp/def_pins.txt
echo "---sample of non-power pins---"
grep -v "vddio\|vssio\|vccd\|vssd\|VDDIO\|VSSIO" /tmp/def_pins.txt | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Get unique pin names from DEF template
grep "^   - " /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u > /tmp/def_pins.txt
wc -l /tmp/def_pins.txt
echo "---sample of non-power pins---"
grep -v "vddio\|vssio\|vccd\|vssd\|VDDIO\|VSSIO" /tmp/def_pins.txt | head -20
